no-restricted-syntax.message: Literal '.runforge/...' duplicates a canonical path. RunForge writes under '.ml/' (use WORKSPACE_PATHS.ML_ROOT from src/types.ts). CONTRACTS.md Rule 2 — root cause of F-COORD-008.
Literal '.ml/outputs/index...' duplicates WORKSPACE_PATHS.INDEX_FILE in src/types.ts. Import the constant. CONTRACTS.md Rule 2.
Template literal starting with '.runforge/' duplicates a canonical path. Use WORKSPACE_PATHS.ML_ROOT from src/types.ts. CONTRACTS.md Rule 2 — root cause of F-COORD-008.
